creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Indulge in a luxurious Thai lunch @benjarongdubai! 

This award-winning Thai restaurant located at @dusitthanidubai has an amazing Business Lunch menu! We had authentic Thai dishes like Gai Satay, Tom Yum Gai, and Pad Thai! 

🍴Business Lunch (Monday to Friday)
2 course: AED 99
3 course: AED 109
Unlimited Thai iced tea, coffee and tea: AED 25

Tag your lunch date!

#Benjarong #DusitThaniDubai #DubaiRestaurant #ThaiRestaurant #dubai #mydubai #visitdubai #dubaireels #lifewithladyanne #ladyandhersweetescapes

transcription.text: Make a wish for ones with a secret And if I manifest best guess I'll keep it, I'll keep it I'm sicko with a phony fate, I'll force one day For once
